epen_ciu.geography: All EPEN cities (binary: DIVISION_LIMA=1 = Lima upper stratum)
notes: 2023 annual = post-Event C (MW 930->1025, May 2022). No pre-period annual available.
INEI code 872 (expected 2022 annual) returns 404; 2022 annual likely not published.
CODCIUDAD not in file; city-level DiD not possible.
MES column present (1-12) for seasonal analysis.
Quarterly seasonality: Q1 has highest MW concentration (share@1025=0.0144).

panel.format: WIDE (one row per individual, year-suffixed columns)

event_c_2021_2023.reason: Only 192 near-MW formal-dep workers tracked 2021â†’2023. Too small for reliable DID.

selection_bias.conclusion: Panel oversamples higher-wage formal workers. Not representative of near-MW workers.

panel.panel_design_note: Rotating panel: ~1/4 households replaced each year. Only ~25% of year-t sample appears in year t+1. Expected 2021->2023 retention = 25%^2 = ~6%, observed 17.3% (some households tracked 2+ years).
